title: Build live chat and notification transport on top of REST plus WebSocket
summary: Continue hardening agent chat, live session streaming, and in-app notifications on top of the existing REST and WebSocket integration that now exists in the client workspace.
scope: stabilize the API client and REST-backed chat flows
harden agent session socket manager reconnect behavior
polish chat transcript rendering and composer UX
deliverables: in-app notification presentation and reconnect behavior
acceptance_criteria: User can open an agent chat and send a message
Assistant responses stream over WS and reconnect behavior is stable
Notifications arrive over the global notifications socket
Reconnect path resyncs stale state through REST where required
